title: taraxacum pannulatum
intro: Taraxacum pannulatum, also known as the hairy dandelion or woolly dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pannulatum include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Taraxacum pannulatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a food ingredient, particularly in salads and as a coffee substitute.
